title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Salesforce India Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Salesforce India Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Salesforce India Ventures Solutions in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Salesforce India Ventures Solutions:
Salesforce India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salesforce India Ventures Solutions!
